selectivity_implications.recommendation: ACB 630A Icu 36 kA — adequate against 9.80 kA at MSB intake (3.7× margin). Verify Ics ≥ Icu at full rating per BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 434.5.1.
MCCB 160A Icu 25 kA — adequate against 8.19 kA at SDB-GF (3.1× margin). Cascade selectivity with upstream ACB verified at Ik"max.
MCCB 160A Icu 25 kA — adequate against 7.77 kA at SDB-L1 (3.2× margin).
MCCB 160A Icu 25 kA — adequate against 7.37 kA at SDB-L2 (3.4× margin).

assumptions: DNO declared Ze=0.35 Ω and PSCC=9.8 kA at MSB intake (TN-C-S) treated as binding boundary per BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 313.1; HV-side modelling supplied for cascade audit only.
Transformer X/R = 6 assumed for 800 kVA urban distribution unit per IEC 60909-1:2008 Table A.1.
Cable impedance per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex E: 95mm² Cu XLPE at 90°C operating temperature → R=0.000208 Ω/m, X=0.0000829 Ω/m.

Peak factor κ computed per IEC 60909-0:2016 Eq. 29: κ = 1.02 + 0.98·exp(-3/(X/R)). κ ≈ 1.61 at MSB busbar (X/R=6) and ≈ 1.30 at floor SDBs (X/R≈2.4) reflecting the resistive contribution of riser cables.
Motor contribution disregarded: total connected motor load = 0 kW, IEC 60909-0:2016 §3.8 contribution threshold (ΣI_LR > 5% of Ik") not met.
Selectivity verification per BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 434.5.1 (breaking capacity) and Reg 536.4 (discrimination between OCPDs).
tool_call_pending: true — calc.iec60909_cascade deterministic execution pending per shared runtime contract.

rationale.chat_summary: UK 3-storey commercial office, TN-C-S 400V TPN. 800 kVA TX feeding MSB then three floor SDBs over 35/45/55m of 95mm² Cu XLPE risers. DNO declared 9.8 kA at MSB binds the cascade. Ik"max range 7.37–9.80 kA across LV nodes; HV-1 ≈ 14 kA. ACB 36 kA Icu and MCCB 25 kA Icu adequate. BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 443 SPD recommended at MSB.

sections.title: Source Specification
sections.summary: Single-source utility supply: 800 kVA pad-mount transformer fed from 11 kV DNO radial network. No standby generator, no UPS. Treated as far-from-generator per IEC 60909-0:2016 §3.4.

decisions.label: Source modelling — far-from-generator
decisions.summary: Utility transformer with no rotating generation on bus during fault. Constant Thevenin source.

sections.title: Cascade Topology
sections.summary: 7-node engineer-declared cascade mirrors the SLD topology: HV-1 → TX-1 → MSB-MAIN → MSB-MAIN.BUS → {SDB-GF, SDB-L1, SDB-L2}. Three floor risers branch from a common busbar.

decisions.label: Engineer-declared topology
decisions.summary: Author-supplied cascade matching the architectural drawing rather than inferred from a board-graph.

sections.title: HV-side Assumptions
sections.summary: 11 kV DNO radial supply, declared PSCC 14 kA at primary, X/R=5. ZQ at HV = 1.10×11kV/(√3×14kA) ≈ 0.499 Ω. c_max=1.10 applied per IEC 60909-0:2016 Table 1 for Un > 1 kV.

decisions.label: c_max = 1.10 HV
decisions.summary: Voltage factor selected for Un=11 kV per IEC 60909-0:2016 Table 1.

sections.title: Transformer + Source Impedances
sections.summary: Z_TX = 0.05 × 400²/800000 = 10.0 mΩ at LV with R_TX=1.64 mΩ, X_TX=9.86 mΩ at X/R=6. DNO-declared 9.8 kA at MSB intake is binding (BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 313.1) and implies the upstream HV network adds further impedance beyond the isolated TX value; the cascade is anchored to the DNO declaration and TX-1 back-calculated accordingly.

decisions.label: DNO declaration is binding
decisions.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 313.1 requires using DNO-declared values for design. The isolated TX calculation would yield ≈22.75 kA at LV terminals into an infinite source; the binding 9.8 kA at MSB-MAIN reflects the actual upstream network including HV feeder impedance and transformer.
decisions.rule: BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 313.1.1 — Maximum prospective fault current to be ascertained

sections.title: Motor Contribution Assessment
sections.summary: Connected motor load = 0 kW. IEC 60909-0:2016 §3.8 trigger condition (ΣI_LR > 5% of unmotorised Ik") not satisfied. No motor sub-transient contribution modelled.

decisions.label: Motor contribution disregarded
decisions.summary: Threshold not met; no asynchronous-motor decrement profile required.

sections.title: Per-node Ifault Computation
sections.summary: Ik"max applied with c=1.05 per Table 1 (LV). Ik"max range across cascade: HV-1 14.00 kA → TX-1 9.85 → MSB-MAIN 9.80 → MSB-MAIN.BUS 9.78 → SDB-GF 8.19 → SDB-L1 7.77 → SDB-L2 7.37 kA. Floor-riser cable impedance per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex E (95mm² Cu XLPE: R=0.208 mΩ/m, X=0.0829 mΩ/m). Peak factor κ from IEC 60909-0:2016 Eq. 29.

decisions.label: c_max = 1.05 LV; c_min = 0.95 LV
decisions.summary: Per IEC 60909-0:2016 Table 1 for low-voltage networks ≤ 1 kV.

decisions.label: tool_call_pending across cascade
decisions.summary: Per-node Ik"max/Ik"min/ipk values emitted as engineer estimates; deterministic recompute requires calc.iec60909_cascade tool execution.

sections.title: Selectivity Implications
sections.summary: MSB ACB 630A Icu 36 kA verified against 9.80 kA cascade (3.7× margin). Each SDB MCCB 160A Icu 25 kA verified against 7.37–8.19 kA (≥3.0× margin). All comply with BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 434.5.1. Cascade selectivity is supported by the impedance drop across floor risers — see Reg 536.4 for discrimination assessment.

decisions.label: Breaking-capacity verification
decisions.summary: All device Icu ratings exceed applied prospective fault by ≥3×.
decisions.rule: BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 434.5.1 — Devices for fault current protection

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: Cascade compliant with BS 7671:2018+A2 + IEC 60909-0:2016. Assumptions captured: DNO declaration binding; transformer X/R from Table A.1; cable Z from Annex E; SPD coordination per Reg 443 recommended at MSB; calc tool execution pending.

decisions.label: BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 443 SPD
decisions.summary: Type 1/2 SPD recommended at MSB origin for atmospheric-origin transient protection given commercial office occupancy.
decisions.rule: BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 443.4 — Protection against transient overvoltages of atmospheric origin
